name: asana-cli
description: Golang CLI tool to manage Asana projects, tasks, portfolios, custom fields, attachments, comments, and dependencies. Features secure OAuth implementation and Claude Code integration via SKILL.md.
review: Excellent Golang CLI with comprehensive Asana API coverage, secure OAuth implementation, professional quality. Model example of a high-quality skill submission covering projects, tasks, portfolios, custom fields, attachments, comments, and dependencies.
